hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'interpretArenaDecision'; then echo '⚠️  WARNING: Modifying interpretArenaDecision — this MUST remain a pure function. Verify no I/O, no DB, no side effects.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '/api/(qr|leadership-engine/qr)'; then echo '⚠️  WARNING: Modifying QR validation route. Critical invariant: QR validation MUST route only through /api/arena/leadership-engine/qr/validate.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd bty-app 2>/dev/null && npm run lint:terminology -- "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | tail -5 || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'src/domain/.+\.ts$'; then echo '🔍 Domain file modified. Reminder: must be pure (no DB, no I/O, no Next.js imports).'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'supabase/migrations/.+\.sql$'; then echo '🔍 Migration file created/modified. Reminder: must be idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS), include rollback note, preserve Core/Weekly XP separation.'; fi
